name: Reverb (Clouds)
description: This algorithm implements the reverb and diffuser parts of the Clouds module by Émilie Gillet. The diffuser is a simple network of all-pass filters which ‘smears’ the sound slightly. It is effective at turning a mono source into something that sounds stereo.

parameters.name: Reverb diffusion
parameters.description: The reverb diffusion. (In Clouds this is fixed at 70%.)

parameters.name: Reverb low pass
parameters.description: The cut-off frequency of a low-pass filter within the reverb.

parameters.name: Reverb input gain
parameters.description: The input gain to the reveberator.

parameters.name: Sample rate
parameters.description: Allows you to run the algorithm at the disting NT’s own sample rate (‘Native’) or the sample rate of a real Clouds module (‘Authentic (32kHz)’).

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.
